description: The NewWorldDialog component is used internally to control the new world prompt when making a new world in dash space.

fields._worldName: The field to define the name of the new world.
fields._mobileFriendly: Whether the new world should be mobile friendly.
fields._unsafeMode: Whether the new world is going to be unsafe mode.
fields._autoPort: Whether the new world should boot with auto defined port.
fields._port: The port of the new world.
fields._accessLevel: The access level of the new world.
fields.CustomStart: The Sync delegate to call, passing this Dialog upon the world being made.
fields._presetIndex: Which preset to use for the new world.
fields._uiBuilt: Whether the world UI is built.
fields._accessLevelRadios: A list of session access level options for the UI.
fields._initialized: Whether the UI is built and ready.

methods.OnStartSession: Called when the start session button is touched.
